If there was just one treatment I could recommend it would be microneedling ##
In my former life I was a scientist so I research everything
A clinical study showed that skin that received a series of microneedling treatments ie 3 treatments a month apart, showed up to ~ 400 % increases in collagen and elastin deposition when examined six months after the last session!! 6o
Microneedling tricks your skin into healing itself but it's not a one session fix.
3 sessions a month apart is recommended.
